title: Kameng Elephant Reserve
tagline: Kameng Elephant Reserve — heritage city of Arunachal Pradesh

overview.short: The Kameng Elephant Reserve, also known as the Kameng Protected Area Complex, is a protected area in the East and West Kameng districts of western Arunachal Pradesh, India.
overview.description: The Kameng Elephant Reserve, also known as the Kameng Protected Area Complex, is a protected area in the East and West Kameng districts of western Arunachal Pradesh, India. The reserve comprises the three protected areas of Sessa Orchid Sanctuary, Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary, and Pakke Tiger Reserve, as well as the Amortala, Doimara and Papum reserved forests within the Khellong Forest Division. With a total area of 1,892 km2 (731 sq mi) and altitudinal range of 106–3,222 m (348–10,600 ft), the reserve has rugged, heavily forested terrain. topPlaces.name: Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area of India in the Himalayan foothills of West Kameng District, Arunachal Pradesh. It conjoins Sessa Orchid Sanctuary to the northeast and Pakke Tiger Reserve across the Kameng river to the east.

items.note: Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area of India in the Himalayan foothills of West Kameng District, Arunachal Pradesh. It conjoins Sessa Orchid Sanctuary to the northeast and Pakke Tiger Reserve across the Kameng river to the east.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kameng Elephant Reserve?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kameng Elephant Reserve is Apr – Jun, Sep – Oct. Summers are 10–22°C and winters are -6–10°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kameng Elephant Reserve?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (138 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (121 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kameng Elephant Reserve?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kameng Elephant Reserve at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kameng Elephant Reserve?
faq.a: Stays in Kameng Elephant Reserve start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kameng Elephant Reserve?
faq.a: The top attractions are Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary.
